hero.headline: Implementation analyst who bridges business needs and technical execution
hero.description: 20 enterprise SaaS rollouts with deep expertise in data migration, payroll systems, and cross-functional stakeholder management. 5+ years translating complex business requirements into seamless platform implementations. Proven track record of process improvement and automation that drives customer success.

experience.title: Lead, Product Implementation
bullets: Led 20 end-to-end enterprise SaaS implementations with full data migration ownership — managing payroll, operational, and configuration data transitions from legacy systems to modern platforms.
Served as primary POC for complex implementation workstreams, coordinating between external clients and internal engineering, product, and support teams to ensure seamless execution.
Developed comprehensive documentation frameworks and process knowledge transfer systems — enabling team-wide adoption of best practices and reducing onboarding time for new implementations.

Proactively identified automation opportunities and process improvements, designing frameworks that reduced implementation complexity scoring and eliminated BRD/UAT ambiguity for faster customer onboarding.

highlights.label: Process Innovation
highlights.text: Built use-case-driven implementation framework with automated complexity scoring — enabling accurate scoping, timeline calculation, and streamlined customer onboarding workflows across all enterprise deployments.

highlights.label: Data Migration Expertise
highlights.text: Successfully migrated complex enterprise datasets across UK, US, and Middle East implementations — handling diverse data formats, system integrations, and ensuring zero data loss during go-live transitions.

highlights.label: Cross-functional Leadership
highlights.text: Coordinated multi-stakeholder projects involving C-level executives, operational teams, and technical staff — facilitating workshops, requirements gathering, and change management for smooth adoption.

highlights.label: Customer Success Impact
highlights.text: Achieved 80% pilot-to-enterprise conversion rate through structured discovery, early value demonstration, and deep stakeholder alignment — driving $350K+ in expansion revenue.

experience.title: Senior Catalog Specialist
bullets: Managed complex data workflows and system integrations for Amazon Fresh, Pantry, and Prime Now — resolving catalog and procurement data inconsistencies across multiple platforms.
Designed and implemented data-driven prioritization frameworks using forecasts, inventory values, and performance metrics — delivering $230K monthly operational savings through process automation.
Collaborated with cross-functional support teams to identify process gaps and implement solutions, reducing invalid case assignments by ~50 per day through improved SOP documentation.

summary: Implementation analyst with 5+ years managing 20 enterprise SaaS implementations, specializing in data migration and cross-functional stakeholder coordination. Expert at translating complex business requirements into seamless platform configurations while driving process improvements and automation. Deep experience with payroll systems, HRIS integrations, and multi-region deployments across UK, US, and Middle East markets.
